raw_content:
Title: Assistant Professor 'Urban and Real Estate Economics' Institution: Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam Department: School of Business and Economics Position types: Assistant Professor Categories: Environmental; Ag. Econ. Deadline: 2026-03-22 Description:

We are looking for an internationally minded, ambitious, and collaborative economist who is eager to contribute to our teaching and research, and who shares our passion for the field of spatial economics. Within our department, this includes urban, regional, transport, and environmental economics.

We particularly welcome an economist with expertise in general (spatial) equilibrium modeling and a strong interest in real estate markets. Ideal candidates bring experience with reduced-form estimation and with developing or applying equilibrium models that explain how land and housing markets interact with wider urban and regional dynamics, such as commuting, amenities, and local public goods. The successful candidate will help advance our understanding of how spatial equilibrium mechanisms influence urban form, housing affordability, and real estate investment, and how these insights can support effective urban and housing policies.

In terms of teaching, the department contributes to several bachelor’s, MSc, and PhD programmes. We offer a dedicated MSc in Spatial and Applied Economics, which provides students with the theoretical foundations and analytical skills to address complex policy questions at a high level of abstraction, while maintaining a clear connection to real-world applications. In addition, we teach in related BSc and MSc programmes, a specialized minor in Real Estate Economics and Finance, several courses at Amsterdam University College, and in the doctoral programme of the Tinbergen Institute. In this position, teaching will focus particularly on courses in Real Estate and Urban Economics.

Your duties

  • conducting and supervising research (including PhD candidates)
  • publishing in leading international economics journals
  • teaching at the BSc and MSc level across several programmes
  • coordinating courses
  • contributing to departmental or school-wide committees and project groups

Your profile

  • a PhD in economics or a related discipline
  • a clear affinity with the broad field of spatial economics
  • strong quantitative and methodological skills
  • in-depth knowledge of state‑of‑the‑art research methods relevant to spatial economics
  • an ambitious research agenda
  • demonstrated potential to build a strong publication record
  • experience with teaching at the undergraduate and master’s level
  • interest in collaboration with societal partners and in research dissemination (an asset)

What do we offer?

We offer a stimulating position within an international and ambitious research environment.

The initial appointment as Assistant Professor is for 18 months. After 15 months, a performance evaluation will take place and, if positive, the contract will be converted to a permanent position. The role consists of 40% research and 60% teaching. We expect a willingness to learn Dutch so that within three years you can also contribute to programmes taught in Dutch.

  • a salary of minimum € 4.728,00 (Scale 11) and maximum € 6.433,00 (Scale 11) gross per month, on a full-time basis. This is based on UFO profile Lecturer / Assistant Professor 2. The exact salary depends on your education and experience.
  • a position for 1 FTE. Your employment contract will initially last 18 months. Afterwards, there is a prospect of a permanent contract.

We also offer you attractive fringe benefits and regulations. Some examples:

  • a full-time 38-hour working week comes with a holiday leave entitlement of 232 hours per year. If you choose to work 40 hours, you have 96 extra holiday leave hours on an annual basis. For part-timers, this is calculated pro rata.
  • 8% holiday allowance and 8.3% end-of-year bonus
  • a wide range of sports facilities which staff may use at a modest charge
  • optional model for designing a personalized benefits package
  • hybrid working (up to two days per week from home) supports a good work-life balance.

About us

Department of Spatial Economics
The position is placed at the Department of Spatial Economics at the Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam, one of the largest departments of its kind in the world. The department is engaged in economic problems in which space plays a prominent role. The academic staff (around 60 persons) address, in their research, urban, regional, transport and environmental challenges from a primarily economic perspective, combining theoretical research and empirical approaches, often enriched through multi-disciplinary collaborations. See www.spatialeconomics.nl for more information about the department.

School of Business and Economics
We at the School of Business and Economics (SBE) at VU Amsterdam bring together socially relevant teaching and research in the areas of business administration and economics. We focus on real-life issues that have a huge impact on society, economics and ecology: from robotics to big data, and from job market participation to change management.

Collaboration and cooperation, transparency and social responsibility are four keywords that embody our approach. Students, researchers and staff at SBE share real-world knowledge in order to devise solutions together to global economic and social challenges. In order to make a positive impact on the world, society and the lives of others.

Are you interested in joining SBE? You will work in a stimulating, dynamic and international environment with motivated colleagues dedicated to helping society make informed choices. SBE employs roughly 600 staff, with 7,250 students enrolled in the Bachelor’s and Master’s programmes and 1,700 executive students.

Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam
Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam stands for values-driven education and research. We are open-minded experts with the ability to think freely - a broader mind. Maintaining an entrepreneurial perspective and concentrating on diversity, significance and humanity, we work on sustainable solutions with social impact. By joining forces, across the boundaries of disciplines, we work towards a better world for people and planet. Together we create a safe and respectful working and study climate, and an inspiring environment for education and research. Learn more about our codes of conduct.

We are located on one physical campus, in the heart of Amsterdam's Zuidas business district, with excellent location and accessibility. Over 6,150 staff work at the VU and over 31,000 students attend academic education.

Diversity
Diversity is the driving force of VU Amsterdam. VU wants to be accessible and receptive to diversity in disciplines, cultures, ideas, nationalities, beliefs, preferences and worldviews. We believe that trust, respect, interest and differences lead to new insights and innovation, to sharpness and clarity, to excellence and a broader understanding.

We stand for an inclusive community and believe that diversity and internationalization contribute to the quality of education, research and our services.

Therefore, we are always searching for people whose backgrounds and experience contribute to the diversity of the VU community.

Interested

Are you interested in this position? Please apply via the application button and upload your curriculum vitae including your publications, a personal vision statement (+/- 1 page) about research and teaching, and cover letter until March 22. We start inviting candidates from the application deadline onwards and the search will continue until the position has been filled with a high-quality candidate.

Submitting a diploma is part of the application process.

salary_eur: Approximately €55,000–€65,000 gross per year (German public sector TV-L E13 full-time)

career_stage: Postdoctoral; PhD completed or near completion
degree_requirement: PhD in Economics (candidates in final stages also considered)
language_requirement: Professional fluency in English (written and spoken)
eligibility_reason: No nationality restriction is stated, and the researcher's English proficiency is sufficient. The position explicitly states that candidates in the final stages of doctoral studies will be considered, which fits the researcher's trajectory (PhD submission October 2026). However, the start date of 1 September 2026 is before the planned PhD submission, so there is a one-to-two-month gap between start and submission — manageable but worth confirming with the hiring chair. The core requirement is a research focus in Economic Theory, Game Theory, or Industrial Organization, which is a substantive mismatch with the researcher's profile in regional economics, spatial econometrics, and applied policy analysis.
eligibility_timeline_note: Start date of 1 September 2026 is approximately one month before the PhD submission deadline of October 2026. The position explicitly accepts candidates in final stages, so this is plausibly eligible — but the researcher should confirm the chair's interpretation of 'final stages' before applying.
research_theme: Microeconomic theory, with specific focus on the DFG project 'Financing, Production, and Dissemination of Science' — requiring expertise in Economic Theory, Game Theory, or Industrial Organization
methods_relevance: Strong mismatch. The position requires 'excellent proficiency in theoretical methods of economics' — formal microeconomic theory, game theory, and/or IO modelling. The researcher's toolkit is entirely quantitative-empirical: spatial econometrics, microsimulation, GIS, policy evaluation. There is no overlap with formal economic theory or game theory. This is a fundamental incompatibility, not a minor gap.
tier_reason: University of Duisburg-Essen is a European institution in Germany, placing this in Tier 3 (good European opportunities) by geography. However, the thematic fit is very poor — this is a pure microeconomic theory post, far from economic geography or regional economics. Tier 3 is assigned by geography only; relevance score reflects the weak thematic fit.
timeline_note: Start date of 1 September 2026 is approximately one month before the researcher's planned PhD submission (October 2026). Classified as 'early' since it falls before the submission deadline, though the gap is narrow and the position accepts candidates in final stages. In practice this is borderline early/ideal.

Title: Post-doctoral researcher in Microeconomics Institution: University of Duisburg-Essen Department: Mercator School of Management Position types: Postdoctoral Scholar Categories: Microeconomic theory Deadline: 2026-04-23 Description:

The University of Duisburg-Essen, Mercator School of Management, chair Microeconomics and International Economics is currently looking for a

post-doctoral researcher (German pay grade EG 13 TV-L, 100%)

--------------------

Start of employment: September 1, 2026

Duration of employment: 36 months (end of project)

Working time: 100% of a full-time position

Your main tasks

  • Active participation in the chair’s research projects, with a specific focus on the DFG-funded project Financing, Production, and Dissemination of Science.
  • Conducting independent research within a dynamic academic environment.
  • The position provides ample opportunity and support for further academic qualification.

Your profile

  • A completed university degree and a Ph.D. (Promotion) in Economics (candidates in the final stages of their doctoral studies will also be considered).
  • A research focus in at least one of the following areas: Economic Theory, Game Theory, or Industrial Organization.
  • Excellent proficiency in theoretical methods of economics.
  • Professional fluency in English (both written and spoken).

Application: Please submit your application, including the standard supporting documents (CV, motivation letter, Job Market Paper, as well as 2 recommendation letters) via EconJobMarket.org or send it per email to Prof. Eugen Kovac, eugen.kovac{{at}}uni-due.de (quoting the reference number 077-26).

Information regarding the Faculty and the recruiting department can be found at: www.msm.uni-due.de.

These combined factors make this a borderline case: not hard-excluded on nationality, but language and field alignment are serious concerns.

Tier 3 (European economic geography/regional science adjacent position) is the most appropriate assignment, though the fit is weak and the language barrier is a serious practical obstacle.

His current Italian student residence permit is tied to his PhD at Politecnico di Milano and does not automatically confer the right to work in Spain. He would likely need a Spanish work visa or permit. However, by September 2026 his PhD contract will be expiring and his status may be in transition; it is not impossible to obtain a work authorisation in Spain, but it is far from straightforward for a non-EU national. This should be verified with the hiring team before applying — hence 'check' rather than 'not_eligible'. Additionally, the position is listed as 'pre-doctoral' and Pekerti is already in the final year of his PhD, making the career-stage framing awkward, though the listing does not technically exclude PhD holders.

However, the project's substantive focus — kinship networks, intergenerational mobility, demographic economics — is notably different from his core research in spatial/regional economics and childcare policy. His spatial econometrics expertise is not directly called for here.

Title: Pre-doctoral Research Assistant positions at Universidad Carlos III de Madrid Institution: Universidad Carlos III de Madrid Department: Economics Position types: Research Assistant (Pre-Doc) Categories: Labor; Demographic Economics Deadline: 2026-04-02 Description:

Pre-Doctoral Research Assistant Position at Universidad Carlos III de Madrid

We are seeking two full-time Pre-Doctoral Research Assistants to join our research team at the Department of Economics, Universidad Carlos III de Madrid (UC3M). The positions will support a European Research Council (ERC) Consolidator project entitled "Mobility, Sorting and Inequality with Extended Kinship Data," led by Professor Jan Stuhler. We offer an initial one-year contract, with the possibility of extension for a second year.

Roles and Responsibilities

  • Data collection, cleaning, and management (including large-scale administrative data)
  • Statistical and econometric analysis (mostly in Stata, R, or Python)
  • Creating tables and visualizations for academic publications
  • Conducting literature reviews and background research
  • Drafting presentations and supporting co-authors as needed

The positions also offer exposure to an active research environment: you will have the chance to attend seminars, reading groups, and interact with graduate students and visiting scholars at UC3M and the wider Madrid research community.

Desired Qualifications and Experience

  • Bachelor's or Master's degree in Economics, Statistics, Mathematics, or related fields.
  • Strong quantitative and coding skills, especially in Stata and/or R.
  • Detail-oriented, organized, and able to manage multiple tasks independently.
  • Excellent written and spoken English.
  • Strong interest in academic research and ideally the intention to pursue a PhD in the future.
  • Eligible to work in the European Union.

Job Conditions

  • Full-time position based at Universidad Carlos III de Madrid (Madrid/Getafe).
  • Duration: 1 year, with the possibility of extension for a second year.
  • Preferred start date: September 2026.
  • Salary: approximately €20,000 gross per year, depending on qualifications.

Application

The preferred start date is September 2026, but this is negotiable. Applications should be submitted via EconJobMarket.org by March 31 2026 (earlier submissions preferred, as we will review applications continuously) and must include:

  1. Curriculum vitae
  2. Cover letter, containing short statement of purpose (including your interest in research and future academic plans) and contact information for two academic referees
  3. Diploma and Transcript(s) from undergraduate and/or master's studies
  4. A writing sample
  5. A coding sample

Interviews will be conducted remotely.

Tujuan Program Pendanaan Pembicara Utama Ilmiah Internasional di lingkungan BRIN bertujuan untuk: mengembangkan kapasitas dan reputasi internasional sumber daya manusia BRIN; mendukung diseminasi hasil riset BRIN pada forum ilmiah internasional; memperluas jejaring internasional dengan pemangku kepentingan eksternal; memberikan dukungan pembiayaan bagi aparatur sipil negara di lingkungan BRIN yang kepakarannya telah diakui secara internasional; dan mendorong aparatur sipil negara lainnya untuk dapat mencapai tingkat kepakaran yang diakui secara internasional. l. Persyaratan Peserta Peserta yang akan mengikuti program ini harus memenuhi persyaratan sebagai berikut: a. ASN BRIN aktif; b. tidak berstatus sebagai pegawai tugas belajar yang meninggalkan tugas kedinasan; c. tidak berstatus sebagai pegawai pegawai pelatihan yang lebih dari 6 (ena) bulan dan meninggalkan tugas kedinasan; d. tidak sedang menjalani hukuman disiplin tingkat sedang dan berat. Ketentuan Konferensi Konferensi/seminar/forum internasional yang akan dihadiri oleh pemakalah kunci, harus memenuhi ketentuan sebagai berikut: 1. Merupakan konferensi/seminar/forum internasional yang diselesenggarakan di luar negeri. 2. memiliki topik yang mendukung pencapaian Tujuan Pembangunan Berkelanjutan (Sustainable Development Goals) melalui Riset; 4.Konferensi/seminar/forum internasional dilaksanakan dalam rentang waktu 6 Februari 2026 s.d. 30 April 2026. Komponen Pendanaan Pendanaan Pembicara Utama Ilmiah Internasional dapat menerima dukungan pendanaan berupa salah satu komponen biaya berikut: 1. Tiket penerbangan internasional kelas ekonomi dengan maskapai menuju dan dari lokasi konferensi/seminar ilmiah internasional; atau 2. Biaya hidup/ lumpsum harian, sesuai dengan durasi yang disebutkan dalam acceptance letter (durasi paling lama 14 hari), sesuai dengan standar biaya yang berlaku di BRIN. Komponen biaya yang tidak dibiayai oleh BRIN, wajib ditanggung oleh Penyelenggara forum atau Sponsor Lainnya, yang dinyatakan dalam surat undangan (letter of invitation) dari Penyelenggara atau surat pernyataan pembiayaan dari Sponsor Lainnya. Kuota Setiap sivitas dapat mengajukan dan memperoleh Pendanaan Pembicara Utama Ilmiah Internasional, sepanjang kuota pendanaan masih tersedia. Prosedur Pendaftaran dan Seleksi Prosedur untuk mengikuti Program Pendanaan Pembicara Utama Ilmiah Internasional dilaksanakan sebagai berikut: a. Direktorat membuka pendaftaran peserta melalui sistem informasi Manajemen Talenta. b. Calon Peserta melakukan pendaftaran dan membuat akun pada sistem informasi Manajemen Talenta. c. Calon Peserta melengkapi profil pada sistem informasi Manajemen Talenta. d. Calon Peserta mengisi formulir pendaftaran dan mengunggah dokumen persyaratan sesuai dengan format yang ditetapkan ke dalam sistem informasi Manajemen Talenta, yang meliputi: 1) daftar riwayat hidup; 2) keputusan pengangkatan atau kepangkatan terakhir; 3) surat pernyataan yang memuat keterangan: a) tidak sedang menjalani tugas belajar, kecuali tugas belajar yang tidak meninggalkan tugas kedinasan; b) tidak berstatus sebagai pegawai pelatihan yang dilaksanakan lebih dari 6 (enam) bulan; dan c) tidak sedang menjalani hukuman disiplin tingkat sedang atau berat; 4) surat undangan resmi (letter of invitation) sebagai pembicara utama ilmiah (keynote speaker, invited speaker, atau plenary speaker) dari Penyelenggara forum yang memuat atau melampirkan informasi mengenai: a) durasi forum; b) jadwal kegiatan harian; dan c) komponen serta besaran pembiayaan yang ditanggung oleh Penyelenggara dan/atau Sponsor Lainnya; 5) draft bahan paparan atau naskah ilmiah yang akan disampaikan dalam forum; 6) surat izin dari Kepala Unit Kerja untuk menghadiri forum; dan 7) surat rekomendasi dari Kepala Unit Kerja atau Pejabat Pimpinan Tinggi Pratama yang disetujui oleh Kepala Organisasi Riset atau Pejabat Pimpinan Tinggi Madya; e. Calon Peserta menyampaikan pendaftaran dan melengkapi seluruh dokumen persyaratan dalam kurun waktu 2 (dua) bulan sebelum pelaksanaan kegiatan; f. Direktorat melakukan verifikasi dan seleksi kelengkapan dokumen calon Peserta; g. Direktorat menyiapkan surat keterangan pembiayaan dan penetapan calon penerima pendanaan; h. Peserta yang ditetapkan mengajukan izin Perjalanan Dinas Luar Negeri (PDLN) kepada Sekretariat Utama BRIN sesuai dengan ketentuan peraturan perundang-undangan; i. Peserta menyampaikan dokumen pra-keberangkatan kepada Direktorat paling lambat 7 (tujuh) hari kerja sebelum keberangkatan, yang meliputi: 1) surat tugas dari unit kerja Peserta; 2) salinan Surat Persetujuan Perjalanan ke Luar Negeri dari Sekretariat Negara yang mencantumkan komponen pendanaan yang dibiayai oleh BRIN; 3) salinan paspor dinas, dikecualikan bagi CPNS atau PPPK serta negara tujuan yang tidak memiliki hubungan diplomatik; 4) salinan rekening bank dan nomor pokok wajib pajak; 5) salinan visa (jika ada); dan 6) rencana perjalanan. j. Deputi menetapkan Peserta penerima pendanaan Program Pendanaan Pembicara Utama Ilmiah Internasional. k. Hasil seleksi merupakan keputusan mutlak yang tidak dapat diganggu gugat. Hak dan Kewajiban a. Peserta berhak mendapatkan pendanaan sesuai dengan komponen yang ditetapkan dalam Keputusan Deputi. b. Peserta memiliki kewajiban untuk: 1) Menghadiri forum, sesuai dengan surat undangan (letter of invitation) dari Penyelenggara forum ilmiah internasional; 2) menyampaikan bukti fisik dokumen perjalanan dinas ke Direktorat sesuai format paling lambat 5 (lima) hari setelah menghadiri forum, yaitu: a) boarding pass asli; b) lembar surat perjalanan dinas sesuai dengan peraturan yang berlaku; c) laporan pelaksanaan kegiatan forum dengan melampirkan bahan paparan, d) dokumentasi presentasi, dan inisiasi kerjasama dengan pihak luar (jika ada); e) sertifikat sebagai pembicara utama ilmiah (jika ada). title: Program Postdoctoral Luar Negeri APCTP 2026 (BRIN Overseas Postdoctoral Programme – APCTP)
institution: BRIN (Badan Riset dan Inovasi Nasional) / Asia Pacific Center for Theoretical Physics (APCTP)
duration: 1 year, extendable by 1 year subject to evaluation
funding_covers: International economy-class return airfare (BRIN), living allowance (BRIN + APCTP), research costs (APCTP)
career_stage: Completed doctoral degree from Indonesian domestic university (doctorate required at time of application, graduated within last 5 years); must be a BRIN civil servant (PNS BRIN)
nationality_requirement: Must be a PNS BRIN civil servant (Indonesian civil servant employed by BRIN) — effectively Indonesian nationals only
degree_requirement: Doctoral degree (PhD/S3) from an Indonesian domestic university (perguruan tinggi dalam negeri), specifically in Physics (Fisika); preferred specialisations: astrophysics/cosmology, biological physics, particle physics/quantum information, condensed matter physics
language_requirement: None explicitly stated beyond standard research communication
eligibility_reason: This programme has two hard disqualifying conditions for the researcher. First, applicants must be PNS BRIN — a permanent civil servant employed by BRIN — which the researcher is not. Second, the programme is restricted to graduates of Indonesian domestic universities (perguruan tinggi dalam negeri), whereas the researcher completed his PhD at Politecnico di Milano (Italy). A third field mismatch is decisive: the programme is exclusively for Physics (Fisika) researchers, specifically astrophysics, biological physics, particle physics, or condensed matter physics. The researcher works in Regional Economics / Economic Geography, which is entirely outside the scope. Even setting aside the civil servant and domestic-degree requirements, the field restriction alone makes this programme completely inapplicable.
eligibility_timeline_note: Moot given hard eligibility disqualifications, but for completeness: the researcher's PhD is from an overseas institution and will be submitted October 2026, after the March 2026 deadline.
research_theme: Physics — astrophysics/cosmology, biological physics, particle physics/quantum information, condensed matter physics
methods_relevance: No relevance — the programme is in theoretical and experimental physics. The researcher's toolkit (spatial econometrics, microsimulation, GIS, regional economics) has no overlap with this field.
portability_note: Not portable. The programme is tied to a specific host institution (APCTP, Pohang, South Korea) and is exclusively for PNS BRIN civil servants.
tier_reason: This is a BRIN programme and thus falls under Tier 4 by institutional origin. However, it is a highly specific sub-programme (physics only, PNS BRIN civil servants only) that does not match the researcher's profile. It is logged as Tier 4 because it originates from BRIN, but it scores near zero on relevance.
timeline_note: Deadline is 31 March 2026, before the researcher's PhD submission (October 2026) and defence (Q1 2027). The programme also requires a completed domestic doctorate at time of application, so the timeline is doubly incompatible. Flagged as 'early' but moot given hard eligibility failures.
pros: BRIN affiliation is noted in the researcher's target tier list (Tier 4)
Awareness of BRIN Talent Management portal is useful — other programmes on the same platform may be more relevant
cons: Hard disqualifier: applicant must be PNS BRIN (Indonesian civil servant at BRIN) — researcher is not
Hard disqualifier: doctoral degree must be from an Indonesian domestic university — researcher's PhD is from Politecnico di Milano
Hard field mismatch: programme is exclusively for Physics researchers; researcher is in Regional Economics / Economic Geography
Hosted at APCTP Korea (Pohang) — no connection to researcher's geographical priorities
No salary specified; only economy-class airfare and living allowance covered
Deadline (31 March 2026) is before PhD submission, creating a timeline conflict
next_steps: Do not apply to this specific programme — multiple hard disqualifying conditions apply.
Explore other programmes listed on the BRIN Talent Management portal (manajementalenta.brin.go.id) that may be open to social scientists or non-civil-servant Indonesian researchers.

Check 'Program Postdoctoral 2026 Batch 1' and 'Program Visiting Researcher 2026 batch 1' on the same portal — these may have different eligibility criteria more relevant to the researcher's background.
Monitor BRIN for any research collaboration or visiting researcher schemes in social sciences, economics, or regional development that do not require PNS status.
one_line_summary: BRIN-funded overseas postdoc at APCTP Korea — exclusively for PNS BRIN civil servants with a Physics doctorate from an Indonesian university; not applicable to this researcher on multiple hard disqualifying grounds.
raw_content: Home Detail Program Informasi Program Program Postdoctoral Luar Negeri APCTP 2026 Pendanaan Pelatihan dan Pemakalah Internasional KHUSUS PNS BRIN Deskripsi Singkat Program Postdoctoral Luar Negeri merupakan Program Pengembangan Kapasitas Sumber Daya Manusia melalui Mobilitas Periset dalam bentuk kolaborasi riset dengan mitra BRIN di luar negeri, bagi Pegawai Negeri Sipil BRIN yang baru menyelesaikan pendidikan program doktor (S3) dari perguruan tinggi di dalam negeri. Tujuan Program Program ini dimaksudkan untuk mendukung upaya penguatan kapasitas sumber daya manusia talenta riset dan inovasi melalui kegiatan riset bersama dengan mitra institusi di luar negeri sehingga mampu menghasilkan capaian riset dan inovasi yang unggul. Institusi Host Asia Pacific Center for Theoretical Physics (APCTP), melalui Program Joint Young Scientist Training (Joint YST), di Pohang, Korea Selatan. Durasi Program 1 (satu) tahun dan dapat diperpanjang selama 1 (satu) tahun berdasarkan hasil evaluasi. Pendanaan - Tiket penerbangan internasional kelas ekonomi 1x PP (BRIN) - Biaya hidup (BRIN dan APCTP) - Biaya riset (APCTP) Persyaratan Peserta 1. PNS BRIN yang memenuhi ketentuan sebagaimana diatur dalam Peraturan BRIN mengenai tugas pelatihan; 2. lulusan pendidikan doktoral yang berasal dari perguruan tinggi di dalam negeri, dalam bidang studi Fisika, diutamakan yang terkait dengan: - astrofisika/ kosmologi - fisika biologi - fisika partikel/ informasi kuantum - fisika materi padat 3. tahun lulus tidak lebih dari 5 (lima) tahun terakhir pada saat mengajukan program pascadoktoral; 4. menghasilkan publikasi minimal di jurnal terindeks global bereputasi menengah/Scopus Q2 dalam 3 (tiga) tahun terakhir; 5. mendapatkan rekomendasi dari Kepala Organisasi Riset. Dokumen Persyaratan 1. Daftar Riwayat Hidup 2. Ijazah Doktoral 3. Portfolio Riset dan Inovasi 4. Surat Rekomendasi Kepala OR dan PR 5. title: Talenta Wirausaha Teknologi (Technopreneur) – BRIN Talent Management
city: Jakarta (BRIN homebase, location varies by research centre)
salary: Rp 25.000 per jam (max 7 jam × hari kerja per bulan)
duration: 6 months (1 month Stage 1 + up to 5 months Stage 2)
funding_covers: Monthly honorarium only; no research budget, travel, or other allowances mentioned
career_stage: Recent graduate (Diploma III, Diploma IV, or S1/Bachelor's degree, graduated within 6 months of application upload date) — NOT a postdoctoral programme
nationality_requirement: Indonesian (KTP and NPWP required — Indonesian national ID documents)
degree_requirement: Diploma III, Diploma IV, or S1 (Bachelor's) — maximum. Must have graduated within 6 months of application. Advanced degrees (Master's, PhD) are NOT listed as qualifying and may disqualify applicants.
language_requirement: Indonesian (all programme materials and requirements are in Bahasa Indonesia)
eligibility_reason: This programme is explicitly designed for recent graduates at Diploma III, Diploma IV, or S1 (Bachelor's) level who graduated within 6 months of application. The researcher holds an MSc from Groningen and is a PhD candidate at Politecnico di Milano — both degrees far exceed the maximum qualification level stated. Furthermore, there is a hard requirement of 'no active employment contract with any party' (tidak memiliki ikatan kerja aktif), which conflicts with the researcher's current PNRR-funded PhD position at Polimi. The programme is a technopreneurship incubator/mentoring scheme, not a research or postdoctoral programme. The researcher is fundamentally overqualified and also contractually ineligible.
eligibility_timeline_note: Even if degree requirements were waived, the researcher's current PhD contract at Polimi would disqualify him under the 'no active employment' clause until at least October 2026.
research_theme: Technology commercialisation, technopreneurship, business model development based on BRIN research outputs — focused on entrepreneurship and business, not academic research
methods_relevance: Entirely irrelevant — this is a business incubation and entrepreneurship mentoring programme, not a research position. The researcher's spatial econometrics, microsimulation, and policy evaluation skills have no application here.
portability_note: Programme requires physical presence at a BRIN research centre (homebase) in Indonesia. Not portable.
tier_reason: Tier 4 by institutional origin (BRIN). However, this is a non-research technopreneurship programme for fresh Bachelor's graduates — it does not fit the researcher's profile at postdoctoral level and is collected only because BRIN is a Tier 4 institution.
timeline_note: The registration window runs to 31 December 2026, which falls within the acceptable post-PhD-submission period. However, the programme's eligibility requirements make it inapplicable regardless of timeline. No meaningful timeline fit can be assessed for an ineligible programme.
pros: BRIN is a Tier 4 institution — correctly captured by the monitoring system
Indonesian nationality is clearly an asset here (KTP/NPWP required)
Registration window extends to end of 2026, overlapping with PNRR expiry

The BRIN portal sidebar lists other potentially relevant programmes (e.g. Program Postdoctoral 2026, Program Visiting Researcher 2026, Program Postdoctoral Luar Negeri APCTP 2026) which should be investigated separately
cons: Hard overqualification: programme is for S1/Bachelor's or Diploma graduates only, not MSc or PhD holders
Hard ineligibility: 'no active employment contract' clause conflicts with current PhD position at Polimi
Not a research programme: technopreneurship incubator focused on commercialisation and business model development, not academic or policy research
Extremely low honorarium: ~Rp 25,000/hour ≈ €1.50/hour — not viable as a main income source
No research output: deliverable is a business proposal, not a publication or academic output
No alignment with the researcher's quantitative/spatial economics skill set
Physical presence in Indonesia required — incompatible with current commitments in Italy
next_steps: DO NOT apply to this specific programme — researcher is ineligible and overqualified

IMPORTANT: Visit https://manajementalenta.brin.go.id/ to check the sidebar programmes listed alongside this one, particularly: 'Program Postdoctoral 2026 Batch 1', 'Program Visiting Researcher 2026 batch 1', and 'Program Postdoctoral Luar Negeri APCTP 2026' — these are likely far more relevant and should be scraped and assessed separately
Flag BRIN APCTP Postdoctoral programme for immediate follow-up — APCTP (Asia Pacific Center for Theoretical Physics) international postdoctoral fellowships could be highly relevant
Maintain awareness of BRIN as a potential future employer for return to Indonesia, but prioritise European postdoc opportunities in the immediate term
one_line_summary: BRIN technopreneurship incubator for recent Bachelor's graduates — researcher is ineligible and overqualified, but the BRIN portal also lists a Postdoctoral 2026 programme and APCTP fellowship that warrant immediate separate investigation.
raw_content: Home Detail Program Informasi Program Talenta Wirausaha Teknologi (Technopreneur) Talenta Wirausaha Teknologi (Technopreneur) Deskripsi Program Dalam rangka memperkuat ekosistem riset dan inovasi nasional yang berdaya saing, Badan Riset dan Inovasi Nasional (BRIN) membuka kesempatan bagi banyak pihak untuk ikut serta dalam kegiatan riset yang dilaksanakan di BRIN, termasuk kegiatan diseminasi dan pemanfaatan hasil riset dan inovasi sehingga dapat secara langsung memberikan dampak bagi perekonomian dan kesejahteraan masyarakat. Salah satu faktor utama untuk mempercepat dan meningkatkan diseminasi hasil riset dan inovasi BRIN adalah menumbuhkembangkan jiwa kewirausahaan yang mampu menggabungkan inovasi teknologi dengan strategi bisnis (technopreneurship). Penjaringan dan pembibitan talenta-talenta wirausaha potensial diharapkan dapat menjadi pendorong terwujudnya diseminasi sehingga teknologi kunci dari hasil riset BRIN dapat menjadi salah satu inovasi bisnis berbasis teknologi sesuai dengan kebutuhan pasar. Program Talenta Wirausaha Teknologi (Technopreneur) menjadi salah satu terobosan untuk menjaring dan menumbuhkembangkan minat masyarakat menjadi technopreneur. Selain itu, menjadi langkah nyata BRIN dalam menciptakan lapangan kerja baru, termasuk mengubah pola pikir masyarakat pencari kerja menjadi masyarakat pencipta lapangan kerja melalui pemanfaatan hasil riset dan inovasi. Skema Pendampingan Program Kegiatan pendampingan Talenta Wirausaha Teknologi (Technopreneur) meliputi 2 (dua) tahapan yaitu: Pendampingan Tahap 1, dilaksanakan selama 1 (satu) bulan. Bertujuan untuk meningkatkan pemahaman peserta terhadap teknologi kunci dari aktivitas riset tertentu dan mengidentifikasi masalah dan peluang sebagai dasar ide awal usaha, termasuk pemahaman dasar terhadap aspek-aspek Business Model Canvas (BMC). Pendampingan Tahap 2, dilaksanakan selama maksimal 5 (lima) bulan. Bertujuan untuk meningkatkan kapasitas dan kompetensi peserta agar dapat memperdalam ide bisnis berbasis teknologi hasil riset, mencakup aspek diantaranya: a) deskripsi ide usaha/bisnis; b) produk; c) analisis pasar; d) strategi pemasaran; e) rencana operasional; f) rencana keuangan; g) analisis risiko; h) struktur organisasi; dan i) aspek-aspek relevan lainnya. Peserta juga akan mendapatkan pengetahuan dasar kewirausahaan untuk membentuk karakter, pola pikir, dan keterampilan non-teknis dalam manajemen bisnis. Syarat Peserta Persyaratan peserta sebagai berikut: 1. telah menyelesaikan pendidikan jenjang diploma III, diploma IV, dan/atau strata satu, dengan tanggal kelulusan paling lama 6 (enam) bulan dihitung dari tanggal unggah dokumen persyaratan; 2. tidak memiliki ikatan kerja aktif dengan pihak mana pun; 3. memiliki ide atau gagasan awal wirausaha yang dituangkan dalam proposal wirausaha; dan 4. berkomitmen menyelesaikan seluruh tahapan Program Talenta Wirausaha Teknologi (Technopreneur) dengan penuh tanggung jawab. Dokumen Persyaratan Calon peserta mendaftar ke dalam sistem informasi sdengan mengunggah dokumen persyaratan berupa: 1) scan KTP elektronik; 2) scan NPWP (Jika belum ada, dapat melampirkan surat keterangan belum memiliki NPWP); 3) scan dokumen ijazah asli dan/atau surat keterangan lulus asli jenjang diploma III, diploma IV, atau strata satu; 4) scan dokumen transkrip nilai asli; 5) proposal wirausaha sesuai dengan format; 6) daftar riwayat hidup sesuai dengan format; 7) surat pernyataan tidak memiliki ikatan kerja dan komitmen pelaksanaan program sesuai dengan format. Template dokumen persyaratan dapat dilihat melalui tautan berikut https://s.brin.go.id/l/TalentaWirausahaTeknologi Hak dan Kewajiban Peserta Program Selama pelaksanaan program, peserta program berhak untuk: a. mendapatkan pendampingan dan mentoring kewirausahaan berbasis teknologi kunci dari aktivitas riset tertentu di BRIN; dan b. mendapatkan honorarium bulanan sesuai ketentuan kinerja kehadiran yang telah ditetapkan. Selama pelaksanaan program, peserta program berkewajiban untuk: a. mengikuti seluruh tahapan pendampingan dan mentoring; b. melakukan presensi setiap hari kerja pada awal dan akhir jam kerja pada lokasi homebase pusat riset penempatan, melalui sistem informasi yang ditetapkan BRIN; dan c. menyampaikan proposal bisnis berbasis teknologi kunci dari aktivitas riset tertentu di BRIN melalui sistem informasi yang ditentukan BRIN, sebagai laporan akhir keikutsertaan program. Insentif Peserta Program 1. Insentif berupa honorarium bagi peserta program sebesar Rp25.000,00 (dua puluh lima ribu rupiah) per jam sesuai ketentuan honorarium pembantu peneliti/perekayasa. 2. Jumlah jam paling banyak yang dapat diberikan insentif berupa honorarium adalah 7 (tujuh) jam dikalikan hari kerja setiap bulan. 3. Insentif dihitung dan dibayarkan pada bulan berikutnya sejak peserta program melaksanakan pendampingan dan mentoring, dengan mempertimbangkan hasil pemantauan dan evaluasi presensi peserta. Informasi lebih lanjut : https://s.brin.go.id/l/TalentaWirausahaTeknologi email : tpa@brin.go.id Luaran Proposal bisnis berbasis teknologi kunci dari aktivitas riset tertentu Periode Periode pendaftaran 01 Nov 2025 - 31 Dec 2026 Persyaratan Persyaratan yang harus dilengkapi calon peserta program Persyaratan Kartu Tanda Penduduk (KTP) Scan/Foto NPWP ijazah asli dan/atau Surat Keterangan Lulus asli Transkrip Nilai Proposal Technopreneur Daftar Riwayat Hidup (Technopreneur) Surat Pernyataan Calon Peserta (Technopreneur) Daftar Sekarang Program Program-program Manajemen Talenta Program Postdoctoral 2026 Batch 1 Talenta Wirausaha Teknologi (Technopreneur) Program Pendanaan Pelatihan Internasional I 2026 Pendanaan Pemakalah Oral Ilmiah Internasional I 2026 Program Visiting Researcher 2026 batch 1 Pendanaan Pembicara Utama Ilmiah Internasional I 2026 Program Postdoctoral Luar Negeri APCTP 2026

title: Program Pendanaan Pelatihan Internasional I 2026 (International Training Funding Programme I 2026)
duration: Up to 14 days (training activity between 6 February – 30 April 2026)
funding_covers: Either (1) international economy-class airfare to/from training venue, OR (2) daily living allowance/lump sum for up to 14 days at BRIN standard rates. Does NOT cover salary or position.
career_stage: PNS BRIN (Indonesian civil servant employed at BRIN) only; functional grade no higher than 'Ahli Muda'
nationality_requirement: Must be a PNS BRIN (Indonesian civil servant at BRIN) — Indonesian nationality implicitly required via civil service status
degree_requirement: none stated beyond civil service employment
language_requirement: Indonesian (programme documentation and administration entirely in Bahasa Indonesia)
eligibility_reason: This programme is exclusively open to PNS BRIN — permanent Indonesian civil servants (Pegawai Negeri Sipil) currently employed by BRIN. The researcher is a PhD candidate at Politecnico di Milano and is not a BRIN civil servant. Furthermore, the programme is a short-term training travel grant (up to 14 days) for capacity development of existing BRIN staff, not a postdoctoral or research fellowship open to external applicants. There is no pathway for an external candidate to apply. Hard ineligibility.
research_theme: Capacity development / professional training for BRIN civil servants in any research and innovation field relevant to their unit's tasks
methods_relevance: Not applicable — this is a travel/training funding grant for existing BRIN staff, not a research position. The researcher's quantitative spatial econometrics and microsimulation skills are irrelevant to eligibility here.
portability_note: Not portable — restricted to PNS BRIN civil servants attending approved international training events; no external applicant pathway exists.
tier_reason: BRIN programme — falls under Tier 4 (BRIN or UGM positions/funding) despite hard ineligibility. Collected and assessed as required by design principles.
timeline_note: Training activities must occur between 6 February and 30 April 2026, well before the researcher's PhD submission deadline of October 2026. Even setting aside hard ineligibility, the timeline is early and the grant is a short-term travel subsidy rather than a position.
pros: Falls under BRIN umbrella — Tier 4 institution of interest
Indonesian-language programme relevant to researcher's home country connections
BRIN Talent Management portal also lists other relevant programmes (Postdoctoral 2026 Batch 1, Visiting Researcher 2026 Batch 1, Postdoctoral Luar Negeri APCTP 2026) that may be applicable
cons: Hard ineligibility: exclusively for PNS BRIN civil servants — researcher is not a BRIN employee
Not a research position or postdoctoral fellowship — only a short-term travel/training subsidy of up to 14 days
No research output or salary component; entirely a staff development mechanism
Researcher is based in Italy completing a PhD and cannot satisfy the civil servant employment requirement
Timeline is early (February–April 2026), before PhD submission
next_steps: Do NOT apply to this specific programme — hard ineligibility due to PNS BRIN civil servant requirement

Visit manajementalenta.brin.go.id to check the other programmes listed on the same portal: 'Program Postdoctoral 2026 Batch 1', 'Program Visiting Researcher 2026 Batch 1', and 'Program Postdoctoral Luar Negeri APCTP 2026' — these may have different eligibility criteria relevant to external or diaspora researchers
Explore whether BRIN has a diaspora researcher or collaboration programme that would allow engagement without requiring civil servant status
Leverage IRSA network contacts to identify BRIN researchers who could sponsor a visiting researcher application under a different BRIN scheme
one_line_summary: BRIN internal travel-training grant exclusively for PNS BRIN civil servants — hard ineligibility for this researcher, but the same BRIN portal lists potentially relevant postdoctoral and visiting researcher programmes worth investigating.
raw_content: Home Detail Program Informasi Program Program Pendanaan Pelatihan Internasional I 2026 Pendanaan Pelatihan dan Pemakalah Internasional Khusus PNS BRIN Untuk kegiatan yang dilaksanakan pada 6 Februari s.d. 30 April 2026 A. Deskripsi Singkat Program Program Pengembangan Kapasitas Sumber Daya Manusia melalui Program Pendanaan Pelatihan Internasional merupakan program yang memberikan dukungan biaya kepada PNS BRIN yang diundang untuk mengikuti pelatihan internasional di luar negeri. B. Tujuan Program ini bertujuan untuk memberikan dukungan berupa pendanaan bagi PNS BRIN yang terpilih untuk mengikuti pelatihan internasional di luar negeri dalam rangka upaya pengembangan kompetensi talenta riset dan inovasi nasional. C. Persyaratan Peserta Persyaratan peserta Pelatihan Internasional adalah 1. PNS BRIN; 2.Tidak berstatus sebagai pegawai tugas belajar yang meninggalkan tugas kedinasan/pegawai pelatihan; 3. Tidak sedang menjalani hukuman disiplin tingkat sedang dan berat; 4. Jabatan fungsional setinggi-tingginya jenjang Ahli Muda; serta 5. Kesesuaian tugas dan fungsi dengan pelatihan yang akan diikuti. D. Ketentuan Pelatihan Internasional Pelatihan internasional yang akan diikuti oleh pengusul, harus memenuhi ketentuan sebagai berikut: 1. Substansi pelatihan sesuai dengan tugas, fungsi, serta kebutuhan unit kerja dan organisasi; 2. Pelatihan yang diikuti bersifat hands-on , dengan substansi yang berkontribusi terhadap pengembangan kompetensi pengusul; 3. Dilaksanakan pada lembaga penelitian dan pengembangan, industri, perguruan tinggi, atau penyelenggara pelatihan di luar negeri ; dan 4. Pelaksanaan pelatihan dimulai pada rentang waktu antara 6 Februari s.d. 30 April 2026 . E. Komponen Pendanaan Peserta Pelatihan Internasional dapat menerima dukungan pendanaan berupa salah satu komponen sebagai berikut: 1. tiket penerbangan internasional kelas ekonomi menuju dan dari lokasi pelatihan internasional; atau 2. biaya hidup/lumpsum harian, sesuai dengan durasi yang disebutkan dalam surat undangan ( letter of invitation ) dengan durasi paling lama 14 (empat belas) hari, sesuai dengan standar biaya yang berlaku di BRIN. Komponen biaya yang tidak didanai oleh BRIN, wajib ditanggung oleh penyelenggara pelatihan atau sponsor lainnya , yang dinyatakan dalam surat undangan atau surat pernyataan pembiayaan dari sponsor lain. F. Kuota Setiap sivitas dapat mengajukan dan memperoleh Pendanaan Pelatihan Internasional, sepanjang kuota pendanaan masih tersedia. G. Dokumen Persyaratan 1. Daftar riwayat hidup; 2. SK pengangkatan atau kepangkatan terakhir; 3. Surat pernyataan, meliputi: a.tidak sedang menjalani tugas belajar, dikecualikan bagi program tugas belajar yang tidak meninggalkan tugas kedinasan; b. tidak berstatus sebagai pegawai pelatihan; dan c. tidak sedang menjalani hukuman disiplin tingkat sedang dan berat. 4. Surat undangan resmi ( letter of invitation ) dari penyelenggara pelatihan internasional, yang menyampaikan/melampirkan informasi: a. Deskripsi dan durasi pelatihan; b. Jadwal kegiatan per hari; c. Komponen dan besaran pembiayaan yang ditanggung oleh penyelenggara atau surat penyataan pembiayaan dari sponsor lainnya. 5. Surat rekomendasi dari Kepala Pusat Riset atau Pejabat Pimpinan Tinggi Pratama yang disetujui oleh Kepala Organisasi Riset atau Pejabat Pimpinan Tinggi Madya. Surat tersebut menjelaskan: a. Pelatihan yang akan diikuti sesuai dengan tugas, fungsi, dan kebutuhan unit kerja; b. Urgensi perlunya mengikuti pelatihan di luar negeri, dengan pertimbangan substansi dan infrastruktur; serta c. Rencana kegiatan re-entry setelah pegawai selesai mengikuti pelatihan. 6. Proposal pelatihan yang berisikan informasi: a. Latar belakang; b. Urgensi pelatihan; c. Tujuan pelatihan; d. Deskripsi kegiatan pelatihan; e. Durasi dan jadwal kegiatan harian; f. Rencana kegiatan re-entry setelah selesai mengikuti pelatihan. H. Prosedur Pendaftaran dan Seleksi 1. Direktorat Manajemen Talenta BRIN melakukan pembukaan pendaftaran peserta; 2. Calon peserta mendaftar menggunakan akun SSO BRIN melalui sistem informasi Manajemen Talenta (manajementalenta.brin.go.id); 3. Calon peserta melengkapi profil; 4. Calon peserta selanjutnya melengkapi formulir pendaftaran dan mengunggah seluruh dokumen persyaratan sesuai dengan format ke dalam sistem informasi Manajemen Talenta; 5. Calon peserta melakukan pendaftaran dan melengkapi dokumen dalam kurun waktu 2 (dua) bulan sebelum pelaksanaan kegiatan pelatihan; 6. Direktorat Manajemen Talenta BRIN melakukan seleksi dokumen calon peserta yang sudah lengkap; 7. Direktorat Manajemen Talenta BRIN menyiapkan surat keterangan pembiayaan dan penetapan penerima pendanaan; 8. Peserta mengajukan izin PDLN ke Sekretariat Utama BRIN sesuai dengan prosedur yang telah ditetapkan; 9. Bagi yang telah mengurus izin PDLN terlebih dahulu ke Sekretariat Utama sebelum diterbitkannya surat keterangan pembiayaan dari Deputi Bidang Sumber Daya Manusia Iptek maka tidak akan diproses pendanaan pelatihan internasional yang telah diajukan; 10. Peserta menyampaikan kelengkapan dokumen pra-keberangkatan ke Direktorat Manajemen Talenta paling lambat 7 (tujuh) hari kerja sebelum melaksanakan perjalanan, sebagai berikut: a. surat tugas dari Unit Kerja peserta; b. salinan surat persetujuan perjalanan ke luar negeri dari Sekretariat Negara yang mencantumkan komponen pendanaan yang dibiayai oleh BRIN; c. salinan paspor dinas, dikecualikan bagi peserta calon PNS dan negara yang tidak memiliki hubungan diplomatik; d. salinan rekening bank dan Nomor Pokok Wajib Pajak (NPWP); e. salinan visa (jika ada); dan f. rencana perjalanan. 11. Penerima pendanaan pelatihan internasional ditetapkan dengan Keputusan Deputi Bidang Sumber Daya Manusia Iptek; 12. Usulan yang tidak memenuhi persyaratan/ketentuan, tidak akan diproses lebih lanjut; 13. Hasil seleksi merupakan keputusan mutlak yang tidak dapat diganggu gugat. I. Hak dan Kewajiban 1. Peserta berhak mendapatkan pendanaan sesuai dengan komponen yang ditetapkan dalam Keputusan Deputi Bidang Sumber Daya Manusia Iptek. 2. Peserta memiliki kewajiban untuk: a. mengikuti pelatihan, sesuai dengan surat undangan ( letter of invitation ) dari penyelenggara; b. menyampaikan bukti fisik dokumen perjalanan dinas ke Direktorat Manajemen Talenta sesuai format paling lambat 5 (lima) hari setelah melaksanakan kegiatan pelatihan, yaitu: • boarding pass asli; • lembar surat perjalanan dinas sesuai dengan peraturan yang berlaku; • laporan pelaksanaan kegiatan pelatihan dan dokumentasi; dan •sertifikat pelatihan atau surat keterangan selesai mengikuti pelatihan. 3. memberikan knowledge sharing /bimbingan teknis/ workshop dan lain sebagainya yang disampaikan kepada sivitas BRIN, sesuai dengan materi pelatihan yang diterima; 4. menyampaikan laporan re-entry sesuai format kepada Direktorat Manajemen Talenta, paling lambat 2 (dua) bulan setelah kegiatan pelatihan internasional. Luaran 1. Sertifikat pelatihan; 2. Laporan pelaksanaan kegiatan; 3. Dokumentasi kegiatan; 4. Laporan pasca-kegiatan pelatihan (re-entry) Periode Periode pendaftaran 09 Jan 2026 - 31 Mar 2026 Persyaratan Persyaratan yang harus dilengkapi calon peserta program Persyaratan Surat rekomendasi dari Kepala Unit Kerja dan Kepala OR/ Pejabat Pimpinan Tinggi Madya untuk mengikuti pelatihan Surat undangan resmi (letter of invitation) dari penyelenggara pelatihan internasional Proposal pelatihan internasional SK pengangkatan atau kepangkatan terakhir Daftar Riwayat Hidup untuk ASN BRIN Surat pernyataan peserta pelatihan internasional Daftar Sekarang Program Program-program Manajemen Talenta Program Postdoctoral 2026 Batch 1 Talenta Wirausaha Teknologi (Technopreneur) Program Pendanaan Pelatihan Internasional I 2026 Pendanaan Pemakalah Oral Ilmiah Internasional I 2026 Program Visiting Researcher 2026 batch 1 Pendanaan Pembicara Utama Ilmiah Internasional I 2026 Program Postdoctoral Luar Negeri APCTP 2026

title: BRIN Visiting Researcher Programme 2026 – Batch 1
salary: Living allowance (biaya hidup) — amount set by BRIN decree
funding_covers: Living allowance only; use of BRIN research facilities and equipment; research networking with BRIN researchers
career_stage: Professor or expert researcher (ahli) with completed doctoral degree AND Scopus h-index ≥ 5; affiliation at a foreign institution required
nationality_requirement: Foreign nationals OR Indonesian nationals with affiliation at an overseas institution
degree_requirement: Completed doctoral degree (S3/PhD) required at time of application
language_requirement: Indonesian (programme documentation entirely in Indonesian; no explicit English requirement stated)
eligibility_reason: The researcher partially meets the nationality/affiliation requirement: as an Indonesian national affiliated with Politecnico di Milano (an overseas institution), he qualifies on that criterion. However, two significant barriers exist. First, a completed doctoral degree (S3) is explicitly required — his PhD submission is October 2026 and defence is Q1 2027, so he will NOT hold a conferred doctorate before the April 2026 deadline. This is a hard disqualifier at the time of application unless BRIN accepts candidates who are near completion. Second, a Scopus h-index of at least 5 is required: with two journal articles (2021–2022) plus one book chapter, his current h-index is very likely below 5, representing a probable hard disqualifier. A third softer barrier is that the programme targets 'professor or expert researcher' profiles, implying seniority beyond early-career level. The language of operation is Indonesian, which the researcher speaks natively, so that is no barrier. Overall verdict: 'check' — two likely but not fully verifiable hard barriers (PhD completion, h-index) mean eligibility cannot be confirmed without verification.
eligibility_timeline_note: PhD must be completed (conferred) at time of application; deadline is 30 April 2026, well before the researcher's October 2026 submission or Q1 2027 defence. This is a material timing barrier.
research_theme: Open — applicant selects from BRIN research groups with visiting researcher vacancies (list at https://s.brin.go.id/l/KEBUTUHAN-VRBRIN-2026); must align with a specific BRIN research group's active project
methods_relevance: Potentially well-aligned if a suitable BRIN economics, regional science, or spatial analysis research group is available in the vacancy list. Researcher's spatial econometrics, microsimulation, and Indonesian development economics expertise are directly applicable to Indonesian national research priorities. However, requires pre-existing BRIN collaboration or identification of a willing BRIN host researcher.
portability_note: This is a fixed in-person residency programme at a BRIN research centre in Indonesia; not portable to other institutions.
tier_reason: BRIN is explicitly listed as a Tier 4 target institution in the researcher's monitoring system. Researcher is an Indonesian national (UGM alumnus) with IRSA network connections, making BRIN a priority Indonesia-focused opportunity.
timeline_note: The application deadline (30 April 2026) falls before the researcher's PhD submission (October 2026). The programme requires a completed doctorate, which the researcher will not hold at the time of application. Even if BRIN were to waive this requirement, the 1–3 month residency would need to occur in 2026, conflicting with final-year PhD obligations and the PNRR funding period. The ideal post-PhD start window is Q4 2026–Q2 2027; Batch 1 2026 is too early. A later BRIN batch (2027) would be far more suitable.
pros: Tier 4 priority institution — directly in the researcher's monitoring scope
Indonesian national with overseas affiliation satisfies the primary eligibility criterion
Native Indonesian speaker — no language barrier for programme administration
Researcher's expertise in Indonesian spatial economics (SAKERNAS, SUSENAS, regional convergence, COVID spatial analysis) is highly relevant to BRIN's national research agenda
UGM alumni network and IRSA connections may facilitate identifying a willing BRIN host researcher
Short duration (1–3 months) is manageable as a bridge or supplementary engagement rather than primary postdoc
Would build an institutional relationship with BRIN, useful for future Tier 4 opportunities
Outputs required (publication + collaboration agreement) align with researcher's career development needs
cons: PhD completion is a hard requirement — researcher will not hold a conferred doctorate by the 30 April 2026 deadline
Scopus h-index ≥ 5 is required — researcher's current publication record (2 journal articles, 1 book chapter) very likely falls short
Programme targets professor/expert-level researchers — profile language implies seniority beyond early career
Timing conflict: April 2026 deadline and 2026 residency clash with final PhD year and PNRR obligations
Living allowance only — no salary equivalent, no travel/relocation funding explicitly stated
Requires pre-existing BRIN collaboration or significant effort to identify and secure a BRIN host researcher
Short 1–3 month duration means it cannot serve as a primary postdoctoral position
Programme documentation entirely in Indonesian — administrative engagement requires fluency (which researcher has, but worth noting)
next_steps: Check the BRIN research group vacancy list (https://s.brin.go.id/l/KEBUTUHAN-VRBRIN-2026) to see if any economics, regional science, or spatial analysis groups are listed — this determines thematic fit
Verify the h-index requirement strictly: check researcher's current Scopus h-index; if below 5, this batch is ineligible
Monitor BRIN Talent Management for later 2026 or 2027 batches that would align with post-defence timeline (Q1 2027+)
Begin building BRIN researcher contacts via IRSA network now, in preparation for a 2027 application when PhD is complete
Consider whether the BRIN Postdoctoral 2026 Batch 1 programme (also listed on the same platform) has more suitable requirements — check that listing separately
If planning to apply to a future batch, target BRIN researchers working on regional inequality, spatial labour markets, or childcare/family policy in Indonesia as potential hosts
one_line_summary: BRIN Visiting Researcher (Tier 4, Indonesia) — thematically relevant and nationality-eligible, but likely ineligible for this batch due to incomplete PhD and probable h-index shortfall; monitor for 2027 batch after defence.
raw_content: Home Detail Program Informasi Program Program Visiting Researcher 2026 batch 1 Program Visiting Researcher 2026 batch 1 Visiting Researcher Daftar kegiatan riset dan Kelompok Riset BRIN yang membutuhkan peserta Visiting Researcher dapat dilihat pada tautan berikut: https://s.brin.go.id/l/KEBUTUHAN-VRBRIN-2026 Untuk Visiting Researcher yang kegiatannya di laksanakan pada tahun 2026 Deskripsi Program Program Visiting Researcher ini merupakan program pengembangan kapasitas sumber daya manusia berbasis mobilitas periset melalui kolaborasi penelitian, pengembangan, pengkajian, dan/atau penerapan ilmu pengetahuan dan teknologi di BRIN , bagi professor atau periset ahli dari perguruan tinggi, badan penelitian dan pengembangan, dan/atau industri di luar negeri. Tujuan Meningkatkan kompetensi sumber daya manusia periset sehingga berkontribusi untuk peningkatan iklim riset dan inovasi nasional melalui peningkatan jumlah publikasi pada jurnal ilmiah bereputasi tinggi, produk inovatif, dan terjalinnya kerjasama riset nasional ataupun internasional. Persyaratan Peserta Warga Negara Asing atau Warga Negara Indonesia yang memiliki afiliasi pada instansi di luar negeri; telah menyelesaikan pendidikan tinggi program doktor (S3); memiliki pengalaman dan keahlian yang relevan dengan topik kepakaran dan dibuktikan dengan bukti rekam jejak (portofolio) kegiatan riset dan inovasi; memiliki h-index scopus minimal 5; menyusun proposal rencana kegiatan selama pelaksanaan program Visiting Researcher ; mendapatkan izin dari instansi asal; bagi warga negara asing harus mendapatkan izin keimigrasian sesuai dengan ketentuan peraturan perundang-undangan; dan Berkomitmen menyelesaikan komitmen pelaksanaan program Visiting Researcher. Catatan:  Pendaftar telah memiliki kolaborasi dengan periset BRIN dan menyusun proposal mengenai rencana kegiatan riset bersama. Dokumen Persyaratan yang diperlukan Daftar Riwayat Hidup; Foto diri; Ijazah Terakhir; Portofolio Riset dan Inovasi; Surat Izin dari instansi asal; Proposal Penelitian/ Kegiatan; dan Surat pernyataan komitmen pelaksanaan program Waktu Pelaksanaan Program - Program dapat dilaksanakan dalam jangka waktu paling singkat 1 (satu) bulan sampai dengan 3 (tiga) bulan . - Pelaksanaan kegiatan Visiting Researcher akan dimulai setelah pengumuman hasil seleksi, dengan mempertimbangkan waktu yang diperlukan untuk proses administrasi perizinan bagi warga negara asing. Pembiayaan Peserta program Visiting Researcher mendapatkan insentif dalam bentuk biaya hidup. Besaran biaya hidup ditetapkan dengan keputusan BRIN sesuai dengan ketentuan peraturan perundang-undangan. Keluaran (Output) Keluaran yang diharapkan dihasilkan oleh Periset Tamu adalah output kolaboratif berupa proposal pendanaan kolaborasi riset/ Perjanjian Kerja Sama dan menghasilkan paling sedikit 1 (satu) buah publikasi ilmiah pada jurnal terindeks global bereputasi tinggi. Periset penanggung jawab (host) Periset penanggung jawab merupakan ASN Periset BRIN yang berperan sebagai pendamping Visiting Researcher. Ketentuan periset penanggung jawab adalah sebagai berikut: • Berpendidikan jenjang Doktor (S3); • Memiliki kegiatan riset yang aktif berjalan; • Tidak berstatus sebagai pegawai tugas belajar atau pegawai pelatihan; • Tidak sedang menjadi periset penanggung jawab bagi Visiting Researcher yang masih aktif; • Bagi yang sudah pernah mendampingi peserta Visiting Researcher, telah menyelesaikan target keluaran (output) sesuai ketentuan; dan •  Bagi yang pernah menjadi peserta Postdoctoral di BRIN, telah memenuhi target keluaran sesuai ketentuan program. Hak dan Kewajiban Peserta Visiting Researcher memiliki hak untuk: Mendapatkan insentif sesuai ketentuan. Menggunakan peralatan dan fasilitas sesuai dengan lingkup kegiatan riset yang dilakukan oleh kelompok riset host . Mendapatkan jejaring kerja sama dengan periset dalam bidang kepakarannya. Peserta Visiting Researcher memiliki kewajiban untuk: Melakukan berbagai bentuk kegiatan kolaboratif sesuai dengan bidang kepakaran, pada lokasi Pusat Riset secara penuh waktu, sesuai dengan durasi yang ditetapkan dalam Keputusan Deputi Bidang Sumber Daya Manusia Ilmu Pengetahuan dan Teknologi Badan Riset dan Inovasi Nasional Peserta wajib melakukan presensi pada sistem informasi setiap hari kerja pada awal dan akhir jam kerja. Peserta wajib mengunggah roadmap pencapaian output di awal program. Peserta wajib mengunggah laporan kegiatan atau kemajuan riset pada sistem informasi setiap akhir bulan. Peserta wajib mengunggah laporan akhir kegiatan riset dan bukti luaran hasil riset pada sistem informasi pada akhir pelaksanaan program Visiting Researcher . Tutorial pendaftaran dapat dilihat pada https://manajementalenta.brin.go.id/tutorial Lihat file Pedoman Luaran Output kolaboratif berupa proposal pendanaan kolaborasi riset/ Perjanjian Kerja Sama dan menghasilkan paling sedikit 1 (satu) buah publikasi ilmiah pada jurnal terindeks global bereputasi tinggi. Periode Periode pendaftaran 12 Jan 2026 - 30 Apr 2026 Persyaratan Persyaratan yang harus dilengkapi calon peserta program Persyaratan Daftar Riwayat Hidup PD/VR Surat Izin dari Instansi Asal Dokumen Komitmen Pelaksanaan Program Visiting Researcher (Form VR-01) Portofolio Riset dan Inovasi VR Proposal Visiting Researcher dan Portofolio calon Periset penanggung jawab Daftar Sekarang Program Program-program Manajemen Talenta Program Postdoctoral 2026 Batch 1 Talenta Wirausaha Teknologi (Technopreneur) Program Pendanaan Pelatihan Internasional I 2026 Pendanaan Pemakalah Oral Ilmiah Internasional I 2026 Program Visiting Researcher 2026 batch 1 Pendanaan Pembicara Utama Ilmiah Internasional I 2026 Program Postdoctoral Luar Negeri APCTP 2026

title: BRIN Postdoctoral Programme 2026 Batch 1
salary: Insentif biaya hidup (amount set by BRIN decree)
duration: 1 year, extendable by 1 year based on evaluation
funding_covers: Living allowance (biaya hidup); access to BRIN research facilities and equipment
nationality_requirement: Indonesian citizens (WNI) or foreign nationals; foreign nationals must obtain immigration permit
degree_requirement: Doctoral degree (S3) completed no more than 5 years prior to application
language_requirement: none stated (programme is Indonesian-language; working language likely Indonesian)
eligibility_reason: Researcher is Indonesian (WNI) — nationality requirement clearly satisfied. However, the core eligibility condition requires that the PhD be *completed* ('telah menyelesaikan pendidikan tinggi program doktor'). Pekerti's PhD submission is October 2026 and defence is expected Q1 2027, both after the 31 March 2026 deadline. He will not have completed his PhD by the application deadline. This is a hard timing barrier for Batch 1. Additionally, the programme requires that applicants have no affiliation or employment with any other institution ('tidak memiliki afiliasi atau keterikatan kerja dengan instansi lain'), which may conflict with his active Politecnico di Milano PhD enrolment. A second batch may open later in 2026 — the researcher should monitor for Batch 2 which could align with post-submission/post-defence timing.
eligibility_timeline_note: PhD must already be completed at application; Pekerti will not defend until Q1 2027 — he is ineligible for Batch 1. Batch 2 (if opened after October 2026) could be eligible post-submission. The 5-year post-PhD window would run from defence date (~Q1 2027), so timing on that front is fine.
research_theme: Flexible — aligned with any active BRIN research group. Relevant groups in economics, regional development, social sciences, and innovation policy exist within BRIN. Specific openings listed at https://s.brin.go.id/l/KEBUTUHAN-PDBRIN-2026
methods_relevance: BRIN has research groups in economics, regional science, and social data analysis. Researcher's spatial econometrics, microsimulation, and regional development methods are directly applicable to Indonesian development research contexts. Methods match is strong if an appropriate BRIN research group is identified.
portability_note: Programme requires full-time physical presence at a BRIN research centre homebase in Indonesia. Not portable.
tier_reason: BRIN is explicitly listed as Tier 4 in the tier system. Researcher is a UGM alumnus with IRSA network connections relevant to Indonesian research institutions. BRIN is Indonesia's national research and innovation agency — the primary Tier 4 institution.
timeline_note: Application deadline is 31 March 2026. Researcher will not have completed his PhD by this date (submission October 2026, defence Q1 2027). This makes him ineligible for Batch 1 on the PhD-completion requirement — not just a timing preference issue but a hard eligibility condition. However, if BRIN opens a Batch 2 in late 2026 or early 2027 (consistent with prior years' patterns), that could fall in the 'ideal' window of Q4 2026 – Q2 2027.
pros: Researcher is Indonesian — nationality requirement fully satisfied with no immigration complications
BRIN is Indonesia's premier research institution, providing high-profile institutional affiliation for post-PhD career
Flexible theme: researcher's regional economics, spatial econometrics, and policy evaluation skills are directly applicable to Indonesian development research
1+1 year duration provides a stable transitional postdoc period
Strong thematic fit with Indonesian regional development, labour market, and spatial analysis research
UGM alumnus and IRSA network connections may help identify suitable BRIN host researcher (periset penanggung jawab)
Prior publication in Bulletin of Indonesian Economic Studies and IRSA Book Series demonstrates existing Indonesian research network and credibility
Opportunity to repatriate skills and build Indonesian academic profile
cons: PhD must be *completed* at time of application — Pekerti cannot apply to Batch 1 (deadline 31 March 2026) as he will not defend until Q1 2027
No-affiliation requirement ('tidak memiliki afiliasi') may conflict with active Politecnico di Milano PhD enrolment during application
Salary amount is unspecified ('ditetapkan dengan keputusan BRIN') — living allowance in Indonesia may be modest; no information on research budget beyond facilities access
Requires full-time physical presence in Indonesia — would require relocating from Italy
Working language is Indonesian; while native, this limits international publication culture compared to European postdocs
Requires prior correspondence or collaboration with a BRIN researcher before applying — researcher must proactively identify a host
Strict attendance requirements (daily check-in morning and afternoon) may feel constraining for an independent researcher
No portable fellowship value — cannot be used to maintain Cardiff or European connections
next_steps: Do NOT apply to Batch 1 (deadline 31 March 2026) — ineligible due to incomplete PhD
Monitor BRIN Manajemen Talenta portal for Batch 2 announcement, typically expected mid-to-late 2026
Review the BRIN research group needs list at https://s.brin.go.id/l/KEBUTUHAN-PDBRIN-2026 to identify suitable host groups in economics, regional science, or social data
Leverage IRSA network contacts to identify potential BRIN periset penanggung jawab (host researcher) who is active in regional economics or spatial analysis

Prepare a research proposal aligned with BRIN roadmap in regional development / Indonesian labour markets / spatial policy — building on existing Indonesian research (Jakarta COVID papers, IRSA publications)
Clarify with BRIN whether active PhD enrolment at a foreign institution constitutes an 'affiliation' under the no-affiliation rule prior to application
Consider applying to BRIN Postdoctoral Luar Negeri (APCTP 2026) also listed on the same portal — that programme may have different timing and location requirements
one_line_summary: BRIN postdoctoral fellowship in Indonesia (Tier 4) — strong thematic and nationality fit, but researcher cannot apply to Batch 1 as PhD is not yet complete; monitor for Batch 2 in late 2026 which could fall in the ideal transition window.
raw_content: Home Detail Program Informasi Program Program Postdoctoral 2026 Batch 1 Program Postdoctoral 2026 Batch 1 Post-Doctoral (Pelaksanaan kegiatan dilaksanakan menyesuaikan dengan kebijakan yang berlaku) Deskripsi Singkat Program Program Post-doctoral merupakan program pengembangan kapasitas sumber daya manusia melalui mobilitas periset dalam bentuk kolaborasi riset di BRIN , bagi Warga Negara Indonesia atau warga negara asing yang baru menyelesaikan pendidikan tinggi program doktor (S3). Tujuan Program Meningkatkan kompetensi sumber daya manusia periset sehingga berkontribusi untuk peningkatan iklim riset dan inovasi nasional melalui peningkatan jumlah publikasi pada jurnal ilmiah bereputasi tinggi, produk inovatif, dan terjalinnya kerjasama riset nasional ataupun internasional. Persyaratan Peserta • Warga Negara Indonesia atau Warga Negara Asing; • Telah menyelesaikan pendidikan tinggi program doktor (S3) paling lama 5 (lima) tahun sejak kelulusan; • Telah memiliki kolaborasi riset atau korespondensi dengan periset BRIN; • Tidak memiliki afiliasi atau keterikatan kerja dengan instansi lain; • Memiliki pengalaman dan keahlian yang relevan dengan topik kepakaran yang dipilih dan dibuktikan dengan bukti rekam jejak (portofolio) kegiatan riset dan inovasi; • Bagi warga negara asing harus mendapatkan izin keimigrasian sesuai dengan ketentuan peraturan perundang-undangan; • Berkomitmen menyelesaikan program dengan menandatangani dokumen komitmen pelaksanaan program; Peserta program P ostdoctoral diwajibkan untuk berkomunikasi dan berkoordinasi dengan kelompok riset yang relevan guna memastikan keselarasan penelitian dengan visi, misi, serta roadmap institusi terkait. Daftar kegiatan riset dan Kelompok Riset BRIN yang membutuhkan peserta Postdoctoral dapat dilihat pada tautan berikut: https://s.brin.go.id/l/KEBUTUHAN-PDBRIN-2026 Dokumen Persyaratan yang diperlukan • Daftar riwayat hidup; • Foto diri; • Ijazah program Doktor; • Portofolio riset dan inovasi; • Proposal kegiatan riset dan portofolio calon periset penanggung jawab; • Surat pernyataan komitmen pelaksanaan program; dan • Surat pernyataan tidak memiliki afiliasi. Periset penanggung jawab (host) Periset penanggung jawab merupakan ASN Periset BRIN yang berperan sebagai pendamping peserta Pascadoktoral. Ketentuan periset penanggung jawab adalah sebagai berikut: • Berpendidikan jenjang Doktor (S3); •  Memiliki kegiatan riset yang aktif berjalan; • Tidak berstatus sebagai pegawai tugas belajar atau pegawai pelatihan lebih dari 6 (enam) bulan; • Tidak sedang menjadi periset penanggung jawab bagi peserta Pascadoktoral yang masih aktif; • Bagi yang sudah pernah mendampingi peserta Pascadoktoral, telah menyelesaikan target keluaran (output) sesuai ketentuan; dan •  Bagi yang pernah menjadi peserta Pascadoktoral di BRIN, telah memenuhi target keluaran sesuai ketentuan program. Jangka Waktu Program Program dilaksanakan selama 1 (satu) tahun, dan dapat diperpanjang selama 1 (satu) tahun berdasarkan hasil evaluasi oleh Direktorat Manajemen Talenta BRIN. Insentif Peserta program Postdoctoral mendapatkan insentif dalam bentuk biaya hidup. Besaran insentif ditetapkan dengan keputusan BRIN sesuai dengan ketentuan peraturan perundang-undangan. Hak dan Kewajiban Peserta Post-doctoral memiliki hak untuk: • Mendapatkan insentif sesuai ketentuan. • Menggunakan peralatan dan fasilitas sesuai dengan lingkup kegiatan riset yang dilakukan oleh kelompok riset host. Peserta Post-doctoral memiliki kewajiban untuk: • Peserta wajib melakukan kegiatan riset sesuai dengan bidang kepakaran, pada lokasi homebase Pusat Riset di BRIN secara penuh waktu , sesuai dengan durasi yang ditetapkan dalam Keputusan Deputi Sumber Daya Manusia Ilmu Pengetahuan dan Teknologi Badan Riset dan Inovasi Nasional. • Peserta wajib melakukan presensi pada sistem informasi yang ditentukan setiap hari kerja pada pagi ( paling lambat pk 9:00  ) dan sore hari ( paling awal pk 15:00 ). • Peserta wajib menyusun roadmap pencapaian output pada saat awal pelaksanaan program Post-doctoral • Peserta wajib mengunggah laporan kegiatan atau kemajuan riset pada sistem informasi setiap akhir bulan. • Peserta wajib mengunggah laporan akhir kegiatan riset dan bukti keluaran hasil riset pada sistem informasi pada akhir pelaksanaan program Post-doctoral.
